tagline: Craft wealth. Share wins. Build clubs.

designSystem.style: Clean card-based layout with emerald-green brand identity, vibrant gradient hero sections, soft glassmorphism-lite surfaces, and warm amber accent for gamification elements. Light/dark themes with distinct palettes.

screens: Feed - Creative progress diary feed with club stories, post cards showing milestones, strategies, and journals with progress bars and reactions
Clubs - My clubs with impact stats and progress, club discovery with search, per-club contribution tracking and active challenge indicators
Quests - Goal Challenge Cycles with gradient headers, task checklists, day countdowns, upcoming cycles preview
Profile - User stats hero, badge collection grid (earned/locked), settings with toggles, light/dark theme switcher
